caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in a recording studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. He sits in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm, which features the brand name "Rode" on its body. The background consists of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, his expression shifting slightly as he looks toward someone or something off-camera to his right. His right arm, which is heavily tattooed, is partially visible. While he remains in the same position throughout the clip, his mouth moves in conversation, and his facial expressions vary from a slight smile to a more neutral speaking expression. No on-screen text or logos other than the equipment branding are visible.
